description: Exceptions for relations completeness checks. Inverse relations from foundational tables to domain tables are intentionally omitted to avoid coupling.

exceptions.reason: Tenants is a foundational table - inverse relations to domain tables would create tight coupling
Users is a foundational table - inverse relations to audit/domain tables would create tight coupling
Roles is a foundational table - inverse relations would create tight coupling
Service principals is a foundational table - inverse relations to audit tables would create tight coupling
Permission rows are referenced by junction tables; inverse collections on permissions are optional
Reference data table - inverse relations to all monetary FKs would be impractical
Audit policy reference data - inverse relations omitted by design
